headline: Quanta Services Links 2026 Pay To Performance As Valuation Stays Rich
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) has approved new company wide incentive plans for 2026. The plans link employee and executive compensation to performance metrics including EBITDA, safety, return on invested capital, and earnings per share. The move is intended to align pay with long term goals and shareholder value creation. Quanta Services enters this compensation reset with shares at $540.19 and multi year returns of 22.9% year to date and 119.8% over the past 12 months. Over the past 5...
